title: Delicate Mediterranean Shio-cure Flatbread
description: A delicate flatbread infused with the flavors of the Mediterranean, featuring vanilla sugar and shio-cure. Perfect for a quick and easy weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, and sea salt.
Gradually add water and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a lightly oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush the edges with olive oil and sprinkle with vanilla sugar and shio-cure.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-moon shape and press the edges to seal.
Place the flatbreads on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Brush with olive oil and garnish with fresh oregano and thyme before serving.
